name: {{name}}'s projects
noProjectsYet: There are no projects for this organization yet

projectCreationDialog.title: Creating new project
projectCreationDialog.description: Complete the next fields and press "Create".

invitationDialog.title: Send invitation
invitationDialog.description: Here you can send an invitation to the email you enter.
invitationDialog.invitationHelp: Once you enter the email address of the user you wish to invite and select the role they will have (Member by default), an email will be sent containing a code/token. The invited user can then enter this code/token in the "Home" section under "Join Organization". Upon entering the code/token, access to your organization will be granted.

sendingInvitationToast.title: Sending invitation
sendingInvitationToast.description: Please wait while the invitation is being sent...

invitationSentSuccessfullyDialog.title: Invitation sent successfully
invitationSentSuccessfullyDialog.description: The user will receive an email containing a six-digit code that must be entered in the Home section to gain access to the organization.

invitationExists.title: Invitation already exists
invitationExists.description: An invitation for this email and organization already exists. A pending invitation has a default duration of 24 hours. If the invited user doesn't log in during that period, the invitation expires.
invitationExists.adminDescription: If you want to send another invitation, it must expire, be used, or be deleted first from the Invitations section below "Organization Members".
invitationExists.memberDescription: If you want to send another invitation, it must expire or be used first.

description.general: You will reset the duration of this invitation, making it valid for another 24 hours without the need to send a new invitation.
description.question: Are you sure you want to proceed?

description.general: You will delete this invitation and the user will no longer be able to join the organization they were invited to.
description.question: Are you sure you want to proceed? This action cannot be undone.

savingChangesToast.title: Saving changes
savingChangesToast.description: Please wait while the changes are being saved...

changeUserRole.title: Change user role
changeUserRole.descriptionIfUserIsAdmin: Are you sure you want to change this user's role? This user will lose the permissions granted by the admin role.
changeUserRole.descriptionIfUserIsNotAdmin: Are you sure you want to change this user's role? This user will gain permissions such as changing other users' roles, deleting projects, and changing action permissions for this organization.

changingUserRoleToast.title: Changing user role
changingUserRoleToast.description: Please wait while the changes are being applied...

kickUserDialog.title: Kick user
kickUserDialog.description: Are you sure you want to kick this user? This action cannot be undone.

kickingUserToast.title: Kicking user
kickingUserToast.description: Please wait while the user is being kicked from this organization...

leaveOrganizationDialog.canNotLeaveDescription:
You can't leave the organization right now because you are the only available admin. If you want to leave, you must assign the admin role to someone else.

This can be done in the "Organization Members" section using the options available for each member.
leaveOrganizationDialog.canLeaveTitle: Are you sure you want to leave this organization?
leaveOrganizationDialog.canLeaveDescription: You will lose access to all projects and data associated with this organization. This action cannot be undone.

leavingOrganizationToast.title: Leaving organization
leavingOrganizationToast.description: Please wait while you leave this organization...

errorMessages.general: Algo salió mal. Por favor, inténtelo de nuevo más tarde.
errorMessages.noName: No se proporcionó un nombre para el nuevo proyecto.
errorMessages.shortName: El nombre del proyecto es demasiado corto (mínimo 3 caracteres).
errorMessages.longName: El nombre del proyecto es demasiado largo (máximo 100 caracteres).
errorMessages.exceededMaximumLevels: La cantidad de niveles seleccionada excede el máximo permitido.
errorMessages.errorCreatingProject: Algo salió mal al crear el proyecto.
errorMessages.noEmail: No se proporcionó un email de usuario.
errorMessages.errorSendingInvitation: Error al enviar la invitación. Por favor, inténtelo de nuevo más tarde.
errorMessages.errorRefreshingInvitation: Algo salió mal al reiniciar la invitación. Por favor, inténtelo de nuevo más tarde.
errorMessages.noUserToKickSelected: Se intentó expulsar a un usuario, pero no se seleccionó ninguno.
errorMessages.errorKickingUser: Ocurrió un error al expulsar al usuario. Por favor, inténtelo de nuevo más tarde.
errorMessages.errorChangingUserRole: Algo salió mal al cambiar el rol del usuario. Por favor, inténtelo de nuevo más tarde.
errorMessages.errorLeavingOrganization: Ocurrió un error al abandonar la organización. Por favor, inténtelo de nuevo más tarde.
errorMessages.errorSavingChanges: Algo salió mal al guardar los cambios. Por favor, inténtelo de nuevo más tarde.
